connections.gloss: burden, carry away, prophecy, [idiom] they set, song, tribute.

connections.def: probably from the same as 939 (through the notion of going down; compare 899); weight; in the New Testament only, figuratively, a load, abundance, authority:--burden(-some), weight. see GREEK for 939…
diminutive of 5414; an invoice (as part of freight), i.e. (figuratively) a task or service:--burden. see GREEK for
